title: ホープフルSの後に・大三角は描かれる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoooa! Admire Vega's in a whole nother
league! Look at her footwork!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: She's so... amazing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: She's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has marked herself as a new rising
star this evening at Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After becoming the center of attention, interview
requests come flooding in the moment the race is
over.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'm Otonashi of Twinkle Monthly! Admire Vega,
your performance today was simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Could you tell us if you have any thoughts on
what your next race will be? Everyone would love
to hear them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our eyes meet. Just like when we decided on the
Hopeful Stakes, she's probably checking her
trainer's opinion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, the decision is a simple one to make.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I want to run and win... because she wanted to but
couldn't.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I want to devote everything I can to the fragment
of her that lives on inside me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything I do is for the burden she carries. I'll
get her to the top, so that she'll shine like no
other.
choice_data_list: Let's go as far as possible, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run in the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Then the next race you have your eyes set
on is...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho.
...That will be all.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That's... her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
To bear the burden you've claimed and see it to
its end...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That's unwavering resolve!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, it's pleasant and sunny
outside.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Top Road! There she is! Today's
favorite, Narita Top Road!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it! I'll win! I just have to keep pushing
myself!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That's... my resolve!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: HRAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road is in the lead! Narita Top Road!
And... she crosses the finish line, a length ahead
of the others!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road takes first place! What an
amazing way to redeem herself right here on the
grounds of Hanshin!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: She did it! Yippeee! Hooraaay! Top Roooad!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! That was a really, REALLY
incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-whoa! T-Top Roooad! Sniffle... Congratulatiooons!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Bravo, bravo! A magnificent performance, Top
Road!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now that the trio has been realized, our adventure can reach even greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Guided by the destiny of their generation, the
stars come together and begin glowing ever
brighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho in our sights, our campaign
through the Classics will commence at the
beginning of next year.

...G1 races. The Classic Triple Crown—the Satsuki
Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho... We're
going... together...
I can't wait... I'm so, so, sooo excited!
I bet you can't wait either...
